name: Bank Statement Loan
whatItIs: A non-QM loan program that uses bank statements instead of traditional tax returns.
problemSolved: Helps self-employed borrowers document income with bank statements.
bestFor: Self-employed borrowers with strong deposits and a recent bank statement history.
notIdealFor: Borrowers who have conventional documentation available or need the lowest possible pricing.
questions: What do the bank statements show?
redFlags: Recent large deposits may require explanation
clientExplanation: This can be a useful alternative when tax returns do not reflect business income.
pricing: Pricing varies by lender and program; verify current pricing.
sourceNotes: Internal product summary; verify current lender overlays.

name: P&L Loan
whatItIs: A non-QM loan program that uses profit-and-loss statements and sometimes business bank statements.
problemSolved: Provides an alternative for self-employed borrowers who can show a P&L.
bestFor: Borrowers with consistent business performance and a prepared P&L.
notIdealFor: Borrowers who cannot provide a current P&L or need a more standard documentation path.
redFlags: Business expenses may affect the qualifying income calculation
clientExplanation: This is often used when the borrower has a stronger business profile than tax return data reflects.
pricing: Pricing varies by lender and documentation package; verify current pricing.
sourceNotes: Internal product summary; verify current lender overlays.

name: Asset Depletion Loan
whatItIs: A financing option that uses liquid assets to support a qualifying income stream.
problemSolved: Can be helpful for retirees or borrowers with significant assets but limited wage income.
bestFor: Borrowers with substantial verified assets and limited current income documentation.
notIdealFor: Borrowers with limited liquid assets or who have more conventional documentation options.
questions: How much liquid cash or investment balance is available?
redFlags: Asset depletion calculations vary by lender
clientExplanation: This is a way to describe income derived from liquid assets for qualifying purposes.
pricing: Pricing varies by lender and program; verify current pricing.
sourceNotes: Internal product summary; verify current lender overlays.

name: Foreign National Loan
whatItIs: A program for non-U.S. citizens or borrowers without a U.S. credit profile.
problemSolved: Helps foreign-national borrowers pursue home financing in the United States.
bestFor: Borrowers who are foreign nationals and can satisfy lender-specific documentation and residency requirements.
notIdealFor: Borrowers who need a standard U.S. credit-based path or who lack required documentation.
questions: What country is the borrower from?
redFlags: Residency and documentation rules vary by lender and state
clientExplanation: This is a specialized path for borrowers who are not U.S. citizens and may have limited domestic credit history.
pricing: Pricing varies by lender and program; verify current pricing.
sourceNotes: Internal product summary; verify current lender overlays.

name: DSCR Loan
whatItIs: A property-focused investment loan that relies on rental income or property cash flow.
problemSolved: Supports investors who may not qualify on personal income alone.
bestFor: Real estate investors with strong property-level cash flow.
notIdealFor: Primary-residence borrowers who rely on personal income documentation.
questions: What is the projected rental income?
redFlags: Property-level cash flow and state availability vary by lender
clientExplanation: This is an investment-focused program that may fit when the property supports the debt service.
pricing: Pricing varies by lender and program; verify current pricing.
sourceNotes: Internal product summary; verify current lender overlays.
